David T. Moutoux, (650-548-0324), appearing for defendant / opposing party Steve Albert

Ruling:
PLAINTIFFS ARTHUR ANDREAS AND ERIKA ANDREAS' Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS ARTHUR ANDREAS AND ERIKA ANDREAS' Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is denied. Based on the opposition, it appears that the basis for the motion is moot. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/PB)
